name: codex-task-dashboard
description: Local real-time dashboard for Codex project tasks, goals, plans, and automations.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Codex tasks, self-reported progress, confirmations, and schedules.
interface.longDescription: Codex Task Dashboard provides a local browser dashboard for scanning recent Codex threads, live-ish task heartbeats, lightweight self-reported progress, project grouping, confirmation points that need user replies, goal and plan summaries, and local automation schedule signals. It reads local Codex session, process, progress ledger, and automation files and serves a high-fidelity operational console matching the approved dashboard design.
